description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:6.10.0 Docker image. Add a pages job that runs in the default deploy stage, caches the node_modules directory with cache key "project", executes "npm install" followed by "./node_modules/hexo/bin/hexo generate", publishes the generated "public" folder as a Pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch only, deploying to GitLab Pages.
